enriched_points.expanded_content: The research utilized a mixed-methods design, integrating qualitative insights from staff experiences with quantitative data on patient outcomes to gain a comprehensive understanding.
Data were gathered through surveys for quantitative analysis and interviews/focus groups for qualitative insights, aligning with best practices in ICU telemedicine research.
Participants included ICU healthcare professionals and patients, selected based on specific criteria to ensure diverse perspectives and adequate representation of tele-ICU experiences.
Qualitative data were analyzed using thematic analysis, while quantitative data were examined through statistical methods to identify significant trends and outcomes.
